subject: Automation adds so-architecture.rst
commit_message:
Automation adds so-architecture.rst

Issue-ID: CIMAN-376

Change-Id: I66f8b9860e93bf9913167ef452f0de609706b08a
Signed-off-by: lf-jobbuilder <releng+lf-jobbuilder@linuxfoundation.org>
